We are looking for a heavy-hitter to join our team for a long-term, remote-first engagement. If you thrive on moving models from notebooks to production, let’s talk.

Setup: Full-time, Remote Contractual.

✅ Ability to optimize for latency and cost (Quantization/ONNX).

CompleteAiTraining.com

The backend - as - training - data angle is sharp - most AI training focuses on language or vision, but real infrastructure decisions are where AI often fails hardest. This role sounds like it catches those gaps early. If helpful, I share job - readiness resources and AI role prep here: https://completeaitraining.com

The backend - as - training - data angle is sharp - most AI training focuses on language or vision, but real infrastructure decisions are where AI often fails hardest. This role sounds like it catches those gaps early. If helpful, I share job - readiness resources and AI role prep here: https://completeaitraining.com

Job by MindBrain

India (Remote)

Senior AI Training Data Engineer (DevOps & Backend Specialist) 3+

Sushree Namitarani D.

HR Executive @MindBrain || Talent Acquisition || HR Consultant

🚀 We’re Hiring: AI Training Data Engineer (DevOps & Backend Specialist)
📍 Location: Remote (India)
💼 Type: Contract
⏳ Experience: 3–8 Years

🔧 Key Responsibilities
✔️ Design real-world DevOps & backend scenarios for AI training
✔️ Write, review & evaluate code (Python, Bash, IaC)
✔️ Analyze AI outputs for performance, security & accuracy
✔️ Work on CI/CD, Kubernetes, observability & infrastructure tasks
✔️ Define acceptance criteria & benchmark solutions

🧠 Required Skills
✅ Strong Python expertise
✅ Experience with Docker & Kubernetes
✅ CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions / GitLab CI)
✅ Terraform or Infrastructure-as-Code tools
✅ Knowledge of DevOps & backend systems

⭐ Good to Have
✨ Experience with Prometheus, Grafana, Redis, PostgreSQL, gRPC
✨ Exposure to AI tools (Copilot, Cursor, Claude)
✨ Background in RLHF / AI data annotation

📩 Interested candidates can apply or share profiles at:
              [sushree@mindbrain.co.in]
